transcript:
[00:00:00.00] We actually know this guy that's sitting out on the porch right now.
[00:00:04.40] Hey, how's it going?
[00:00:07.00] He does not care to know us anymore, apparently.
[00:00:10.20] He's a girlfriend who used to cheat on him with me.
[00:00:12.80] True story.
[00:00:15.80] Nice.
[00:00:16.80] Oh, it's...
[00:00:17.80] Is this a one-way street delivery dog?
[00:00:20.80] Are you losing your mind?
[00:00:22.20] Don't post this.
[00:00:23.20] What?
[00:00:25.20] I'm gonna not even know what to do.
[00:00:28.00] I'm also gonna slash your tires.
[00:00:29.60] I'll be like an asshole.
[00:00:30.60] I'm gonna slash your tires so we both have to walk deliveries around
[00:00:33.60] and then you'll really understand what a drinker you're resolved about.
[00:00:39.20] All right.
[00:00:48.60] This is...
[00:00:49.60] Tracy, can you chime in on this?
[00:00:53.20] Tracy, can you chime?
[00:00:55.40] Tracy!
[00:00:57.40] All right.
[00:00:59.40] Check it out, that guy's...
